info.name: text-delete
info.text: There are real, and valuable prizes for winning in life

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life has rules that everyone is supposed to follow

info.name: text-delete
info.text: There is no handy instruction booklet for life, you have to figure out the rules as you go

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Most people agree on the desired outcome of life, but everyone decides on their own strategy of how to reach that goal.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is meant to be enjoyed, and most people would agree that they had fun while living it.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: People sometimes cheat in life, even when the stakes are low

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Some people put too much emphasis on winning in life, and forget to enjoy it for what it is

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Building up a strong team can help you to win in life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: When you reach the last inning in life, you might be so far ahead that you don't need to keep struggling, or so far behind that you might as well relax.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Money, power, and respect can be thought of as points on the scoreboard of life

info.name: text-delete
info.text: In life, you have to deal with the cards that you were dealt at the beginning

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes you just have to roll the dice and hope for the best.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life has its winners and its losers, but no one wants you to give up and stop trying to play

info.name: text-delete
info.text: As the old saying goes, sometimes the way you play is more important than whether you win or lose

info.name: text-delete
info.text: People respect a player who acts graciously, whether he or she is winning or losing

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is not always a zero-sum game, you can win by helping others, and your success does not have to mean that someone else loses.
